headline: Artemis II 🚀🌕 YEETS Earth's Orbit for Moon's Far Side SLAY 💥🫡
text:
Artemis II squad 🧑‍🚀👩‍🚀🇨🇦🇺🇸 just DROPPED the MIC 🎤🍆 on Earth's orbit 😤🚀, firing that THICC Orion engine 💨🔥 for a FLawless 5:55 TLI burn 💣⏱️ – first human YEET 🌍➡️🌌 since Apollo homies dipped in '72! 🚀🕺 Canadian BADASS Jeremy Hansen 🇨🇦🧔 'feelin' PRETTY GOOD 😎💦 up here zoomin' to the Moon' – first non-'Murican moonboi MOONING history 🍑🌕!

Crew's LOOPIN' 🌀🌕 around the dark side like cosmic DOUGHNUTS 🍩🛸, slingin' farther than Apollo 13's wild ride 📈 4,700+ miles BEYOND lunar turf 🤯🌌 – NASA simps ran MILLIONS of drills 🧑‍💻🔄 to keep these space cowboys SAFE AF 🛡️👨‍🚀! Commander Reid Wiseman 🧑‍✈️💥 SPILLED: 'Earth's FULL GLOBE view pole-to-pole 🌍❄️🔥 paused us in our TRACKS 😱👀 – SPECTACULAR AF!' Window-glued astro-simps 🤤🪟 watchin' blue marble SHRINK 👋🌏 while Moon SWELLS like a YEASTY BOI 🥖🌕.

TLI ain't NO point of no return 🛑🚫 – controllers can U-TURN that bad boy 🛞💨 back home FASTER than a SpaceX flop 😂🚀, or loop the Moon for quick splashdown 🏊‍♂️🌊. Orion boss Howard Hu 😄🧑‍💼 GRINNIN' ear-to-ear: 'GREAT couple days, bros! 🥳📈' Sixth day? TOTAL SOLAR ECLIPSE PARTY 🎉☀️🌑 – Moon COCKBLOCKS Sun's glow 👀💍 revealin' shimmering CORONA halo ✨🌕 with Earth hangin' like a side chick 👯‍♀️!

Hansen droppin' DEEP bars 🎤💯: 'Humanity's POWER ✊🔥 carryin' us – your HOPES 🚀 are our BOOSTER juice!' From high Earth orbit chill sesh 🛋️🛰️ checkin' engines, nav, life support ✅➡️ final GREEN LIGHT 🟢 for that SPEED SURGE 📈 1000s km/h – now deep space ORGY 💦🌌 with cratered Moon FILLIN' the frame like a THICC influencer 🍑📸! Artemis II ain't just flyin', it's THRUSTIN' humanity back to lunar SWAG 👑🌕 – TLI lingo GOAT 🐐, one giant LEAP closer to moonwalkin' like MJ 🕺💃! 🚀🤖🌍
